Job Title: Senior Software QA Lead / Asst Manager
Text: Indeewara Gunathilaka who worked in my QA Team - I found him to be an exceptionally well-organized and highly dependable QA engineer. He consistently demonstrated strong ownership of his work and delivered high-quality results, even under tight timelines and pressure.  What truly sets indeewara apart is his out-of-the-box thinking. He doesn’t just test what is given — he challenges assumptions, anticipates risks, and identifies edge cases that significantly improve product quality. His analytical mindset and attention to detail helped the team prevent critical defects and improve overall system stability. He is also a very collaborative team member who communicates clearly, supports others, and contributes positively to team morale. Whether mentoring juniors, coordinating with developers, or driving test strategy, Indeewara handled responsibilities with maturity and professionalism. I can confidently say that he is a very strong resource and will be a valuable asset to any organization.

I had the pleasure of managing Indeewara Gunathilaka during his time as an Application Support Specialist at Teknowledge Shared Services. Indeewara is a highly dependable and detail-oriented professional who consistently demonstrated exceptional problem-solving and teamwork skills throughout his tenure.  He played a key role in minimizing production downtime by quickly identifying issues, implementing immediate workarounds, and coordinating effectively with development teams across the US, Thailand, and Sri Lanka to ensure timely resolutions. Indeewara also made a lasting impact by improving our support efficiency, he trained junior analysts and helped establish new standard operating procedures that significantly reduced ticket resolution time.  His technical expertise, proactive communication, and commitment to quality made him a vital member of our support operations. Indeewara consistently went above and beyond to ensure system stability and customer satisfaction, even during high-pressure situations.  I highly recommend Indeewara Gunathilaka for any technical or support engineering role. His dedication, analytical mindset, and collaborative nature would make him an asset to any organization.

I had the privilege of managing Indeewara Gunathilaka at TeKnowledge Shared Services, first in his role as an Application Support Specialist and later as a QA Engineer. Having worked with him across these two capacities, I’ve seen firsthand how adaptable, dedicated, and growth-driven he is.  As an Application Support Specialist, Indeewara demonstrated excellent problem-solving skills, strong communication with stakeholders, and an unwavering commitment to resolving issues efficiently. His ability to understand business needs and provide practical solutions quickly made him a reliable go-to person for the team.  When he transitioned into QA Engineering, he took on the challenge with the same enthusiasm and professionalism. He quickly built expertise in testing methodologies, quality assurance practices, and worked collaboratively with developers to ensure smooth and successful project deliveries. As his Project Manager, I was impressed by his attention to detail, structured approach to testing, and his continuous drive to improve processes.  Indeewara’s combination of technical knowledge, adaptability, and team-oriented mindset makes him a true asset to any organization. I wholeheartedly recommend him for any role that requires both technical skill and collaborative spirit.
